name: Salesforce
description: Enterprise customer relationship management (CRM) platform.
access_detail: Requires a paid plan or developer trial account to get API keys, admin approval often needed for production.
api_surface: REST, SOAP, Bulk, GraphQL APIs. Extremely broad.

name: HubSpot
description: Inbound marketing, sales, and service software platform.
access_detail: Free developer accounts allow creating test portals, and standard accounts have self-serve API access.

name: Pipedrive
description: Pipeline-based CRM tool for sales teams.
access_detail: Anyone can sign up for a 14-day free trial and get an API key or create an OAuth app immediately.

name: Attio
description: A modern, customizable CRM built for tech companies.
access_detail: You can sign up for a free account and generate API keys instantly.

name: Twenty
description: An open-source, customizable CRM platform.
access_detail: Can be self-hosted for free or signed up via cloud trial to get keys.

name: Podio
description: A cloud-based collaboration CRM and project tool by Citrix.
access_detail: Free trials are available, and developer keys can be requested through the account.

name: Zoho CRM
description: An enterprise-grade CRM software for sales processes.
access_detail: Offers free developer accounts and trials to build integrations.

name: Close
description: A sales engagement CRM platform for startups and SMBs.
access_detail: 14-day free trial gives instant access to API keys.

name: Copper
description: A CRM designed specifically for Google Workspace users.
access_detail: 14-day free trial provides access to API keys via settings.

name: DealCloud
description: A CRM platform built for investment banking and private equity.
access_detail: Requires a paid institutional subscription; no self-serve free trials or public developer sandboxes exist.
blocker: No self-serve developer environment; enterprise paid subscription required.

name: Zendesk
description: A customer service and support ticket system.
access_detail: Offers a free developer sandbox account upon signup.

name: Intercom
description: A customer messaging and conversational relationship platform.
access_detail: Can create a free developer workspace to get access tokens instantly.

name: Freshdesk
description: A customer support and ticketing software.
access_detail: Free trial allows generating API keys instantly.

name: Front
description: A customer operations platform combining shared inboxes and CRM.
access_detail: Free developer environments are available for testing.

name: Pylon
description: A support tracking tool integrated into Slack/Microsoft Teams.
access_detail: Requires a paid plan or booking a demo to get access. No self-serve developer accounts.
blocker: Requires active paid business contract or sales engagement.

name: LiveAgent
description: Multi-channel help desk and live chat software.
access_detail: Anyone can sign up for a free trial or free tier and generate API keys.

name: Plain
description: A customer support platform built for developer tools and startups.
access_detail: Free tier allows creating API keys immediately.

name: Help Scout
description: A customer support platform offering shared inboxes and docs.
access_detail: Free trial accounts allow developers to create API keys.

name: Gorgias
description: An ecommerce-focused customer service helpdesk.
access_detail: Anyone can start a free trial and access API keys immediately.

name: Gladly
description: A people-centric customer service platform.
access_detail: Restricted to enterprise clients; no public signup, sandbox, or self-serve credential creation is available.
blocker: Strict enterprise gate. Requires custom contract and corporate onboarding.

name: Slack
description: A channel-based collaboration and chat platform.
access_detail: Can create a free workspace and build apps with instant tokens.
api_surface: Web API (REST), Events API, Socket Mode. Very broad.

name: Twilio
description: A cloud communications platform for SMS, voice, and messaging.
access_detail: Provides a free sandbox/trial account with credits.

name: Zoho Cliq
description: A team collaboration and chat software by Zoho.
access_detail: Free accounts can register integrations immediately.

name: Lark (Larksuite)
description: An enterprise collaboration suite featuring chat, docs, and calendar.
access_detail: Anyone can sign up for a free Lark suite and register custom apps on Lark Open Platform.

name: Pumble
description: A free team chat and collaboration app by Clockify's parent.
access_detail: Free workspace setup allows app creation.

name: Discord
description: A voice, video, and text communication service popular with communities.
access_detail: Anyone can create a developer account and bot instantly.

name: Telegram
description: A cloud-based mobile and desktop messaging app.
access_detail: Can create a bot instantly via BotFather for free.

name: WhatsApp Business
description: A messaging platform for business communication.
access_detail: Free test accounts with sandbox numbers can be set up via Meta developers portal.

name: Aircall
description: A cloud-based call center software for sales and support.
access_detail: Anyone can get a 7-day free trial and obtain API keys instantly in the dashboard.

name: Vonage
description: A cloud communications platform for API voice/SMS.
access_detail: Free developer account with sandbox credits.

name: Google Ads
description: Google's online advertising platform.
access_detail: Developer tokens and test accounts can be requested, but production access requires developer token approval and billing verification.
blocker: Admin review required for developer token approval.

name: Meta Ads
description: Facebook's advertising and marketing API.
access_detail: Self-serve for sandbox, but standard production access requires App Review by Meta.
blocker: App Review required for standard access tier.

name: LinkedIn Ads
description: LinkedIn'sprofessional advertising platform.
access_detail: Requires requesting access to the Developer Portal, and API applications must be approved through the Developer Program.
blocker: Application approval needed through the LinkedIn Developer Program.

name: GoHighLevel
description: An all-in-one marketing and CRM platform for agencies.
access_detail: Free developer account allows creating OAuth apps.

name: Mailchimp
description: An email marketing and automation platform.
access_detail: Free account allows generating API keys instantly.

name: Klaviyo
description: A marketing automation platform for email, SMS, and push notifications.
access_detail: Free account allows generating API keys instantly.

name: systeme.io
description: All-in-one online business software for funnels, emails, and courses.
access_detail: Free plan offers instant access to API keys in settings.

name: Pinterest
description: A visual discovery and bookmarking social network.
access_detail: Free developer account allows application registration.

name: Threads (Meta)
description: Meta's text-based conversational social network app.
access_detail: Developers can register app under Meta Developers Portal.

name: SendGrid
description: A cloud-based email delivery service by Twilio.
access_detail: Anyone can sign up for a free plan and get an API key instantly.

name: Shopify
description: A multi-channel cloud commerce platform.
access_detail: Can create a free Shopify Partner account with unlimited development stores.
api_surface: REST & GraphQL Admin APIs. Extremely broad.

name: WooCommerce
description: An open-source e-commerce plugin for WordPress.
access_detail: Free plugin; anyone can install and generate keys.

name: BigCommerce
description: A hosted e-commerce platform for businesses.
access_detail: Anyone can sign up for a 15-day trial and get API credentials immediately.

name: Salesforce Commerce Cloud
description: Salesforce's enterprise B2C and B2B commerce platform.
access_detail: Requires a Salesforce customer or partner account with Account Manager access.
blocker: Requires enterprise partner account; no open developer signup.

name: Magento (Adobe Commerce)
description: An open-source and enterprise e-commerce platform by Adobe.
access_detail: The open-source edition can be self-hosted for free, while Adobe Commerce Cloud is enterprise gated.
api_surface: REST, SOAP, GraphQL APIs. Very broad.

name: Squarespace
description: A website building and hosting platform.
access_detail: API keys require a website subscription on the paid 'Website Business' or 'Commerce' plans.
blocker: Requires a paid Squarespace site subscription.

name: Ecwid
description: A SaaS e-commerce widget platform.
access_detail: Free developer account is available to create applications.

name: Gumroad
description: An e-commerce platform for creators to sell digital products.
access_detail: Free account allows obtaining API tokens in settings immediately.

name: Amazon Selling Partner
description: An API to access Amazon seller account data and listings.
access_detail: Requires a paid Amazon Professional Seller account ($39.99/mo) and developer registration approval.
blocker: Paid Seller account requirement plus developer verification gate.

name: fanbasis
description: A digital product platform for influencers and creators.
access_detail: No public API developer documentation or self-serve developer credentials are available.
blocker: Closed platform with no public developer API or documentation.

name: DataForSEO
description: A provider of SEO and search engine scraping APIs.
access_detail: Signup is free and includes $1 trial credits.

name: SE Ranking
description: An all-in-one SEO platform for keyword tracking and audits.
access_detail: API is only available on Business paid plans ($189+/mo). No free trial developer access.
blocker: API access restricted to expensive paid Business plans.

name: Ahrefs
description: A search engine intelligence platform for backlinks and SEO.
access_detail: Requires a paid enterprise subscription plan for API access.
blocker: Expensive enterprise paid plans required to access the API.

name: MrScraper
description: A visual web scraper and parsing tool.
access_detail: Offers a free tier or free trial with API access.

name: Apify
description: A web scraping, data extraction, and automation platform.
access_detail: Free plan with monthly $5 credits.

name: Firecrawl
description: An API to crawl and convert websites into LLM-ready markdown.
access_detail: Free plan with 500 scrape credits on signup.

name: Bright Data
description: A proxy and web data collection platform.
access_detail: Free signup with trial credits available for testing proxies/scrapers.

name: Sherlock
description: An open-source OSINT tool to find usernames across social networks.
access_detail: Open source command line tool; completely free.
api_surface: CLI only (Python package/script). No hosted REST API.

name: Waterfall.io
description: Contact and company intelligence engine.
access_detail: Requires institutional demo booking; no self-serve account or public docs.
blocker: No public developer API or documentation.

name: Clay
description: A data enrichment spreadsheet-like platform.
access_detail: API keys are only accessible to paid members or during trials.
blocker: Requires a paid workspace or trial account.

name: GitHub
description: A web-based hosting service for version control using Git.
access_detail: Free developer access immediately.
api_surface: REST and GraphQL APIs. Extremely broad.

name: Vercel
description: A cloud platform for serverless deployment and frontend hosting.
access_detail: Free personal account provides instant API tokens.

name: Netlify
description: A cloud hosting and serverless backend services platform.
access_detail: Free plan offers instant API tokens.

name: Cloudflare
description: A cloud security, performance, and serverless edge platform.
access_detail: Free signup with instant API token generation.

name: Supabase
description: An open-source Firebase alternative based on PostgreSQL.
access_detail: Free tier allows creating projects and generating keys instantly.

name: Neo4j
description: A graph database management system.
access_detail: Free Neo4j Aura instances are available instantly online.
api_surface: Cypher over Bolt protocol, REST HTTP API. Medium.

name: Snowflake
description: A cloud-based data warehousing platform.
access_detail: 30-day free trial ($400 credits) with SQL API access.

name: MongoDB Atlas
description: A cloud-hosted MongoDB database service.
access_detail: Free shared cluster includes full Atlas Administration API.
api_surface: REST Atlas Admin API, Data API (REST). Broad.

name: Datadog
description: A monitoring and analytics platform for cloud applications.
access_detail: 14-day free trial allows generating keys immediately.

name: Sentry
description: An open-source error tracking and application monitoring platform.
access_detail: Free developer tier and trial allow generating organization tokens instantly.

name: Notion
description: A workspace app for notes, tasks, databases, and collaboration.
access_detail: Free personal workspace allows creating integrations immediately.

name: Airtable
description: A cloud-based spreadsheet-database hybrid platform.
access_detail: Free plan offers API token generation.

name: Linear
description: A modern software development tool for issue tracking.
access_detail: Free tier allows immediate API key generation.

name: Jira
description: An enterprise project tracker for software teams by Atlassian.
access_detail: Free developer/test instance allows token generation.

name: Asana
description: A web and mobile work management platform.
access_detail: Free personal account provides instant API tokens.

name: Monday.com
description: A work operating system for managing workflows and projects.
access_detail: Anyone can sign up for a developer trial or free account and get API keys.

name: ClickUp
description: An all-in-one productivity and task management platform.
access_detail: Free plan provides access to API keys immediately.

name: Coda
description: A collaborative document editor combining text, tables, and buttons.
access_detail: Free plan allows generating API tokens.

name: Smartsheet
description: A work management and spreadsheet platform.
access_detail: 30-day free trial allows developers to generate access tokens.

name: Harvest
description: A cloud time tracking and invoicing tool.
access_detail: 30-day free trial allows generating tokens immediately.

name: Stripe
description: A financial infrastructure and payment processing platform.
access_detail: Free developer account includes instant access to test keys.

name: Plaid
description: A fintech network connecting bank accounts to financial apps.
access_detail: Offers a free Sandbox mode to get credentials instantly.

name: Binance
description: A global cryptocurrency exchange platform.
access_detail: Registration is free; users can generate API keys after verifying accounts.

name: Paygent Connect
description: A payment service gateway linked to NMI (Network Merchants).
access_detail: Requires applying for a merchant account with Paygent/NMI. No public sandbox or free trials are self-serve.
blocker: Requires merchant onboarding and application approval.

name: iPayX
description: An electronic bill presentment and payment platform.
access_detail: Proprietary enterprise solution. No self-serve trials, developer sandboxes, or public documentation exist.
blocker: No public developer documentation or API surface available.

name: QuickBooks
description: An accounting software for small businesses by Intuit.
access_detail: Free developer portal accounts can create sandbox QuickBooks companies instantly.

name: Xero
description: A cloud-based accounting system for small and medium businesses.
access_detail: Free developer account includes demo companies and credentials.

name: Brex
description: A corporate card and spend management platform for startups.
access_detail: Developer credentials require a Brex business customer account. No generic public signup is available.
blocker: API access requires an active Brex corporate card account.

name: Ramp
description: A finance automation platform offering corporate cards and expense management.
access_detail: Restricted to corporate customers; developer credentials require a Ramp business account.
blocker: Requires a verified corporate customer account on Ramp.

name: PitchBook
description: A financial data provider for private and public equity markets.
access_detail: Access requires a sales contact and paid data plan ($20k+/yr). No free developer access.
blocker: Sales gate and very expensive data subscription ($20k+/yr).

name: NotebookLM
description: Google's AI notebook tool built on Gemini.
access_detail: The direct consumer NotebookLM does not offer a public API. Enterprise API features are gated under Google Cloud Gemini enterprise preview.
blocker: No public developer API is offered for consumer NotebookLM; enterprise features require GCP preview.

name: Otter AI
description: An AI meeting assistant and transcription tool.
access_detail: Otter does not offer a public developer API or API keys. Integration requires enterprise contracts.
blocker: No public API surface or documentation available.

name: Fathom
description: An AI-powered Zoom/Teams/Meet meeting transcription recorder.
access_detail: Only available to Enterprise plan customers or via partner integrations. No public self-serve sandbox.
blocker: Requires an active enterprise paid subscription.

name: Consensus
description: An AI search engine that finds evidence-based answers in research.
access_detail: No public API developer console. Commercial access requires contacting their sales team.
blocker: Closed API. No public documentation or developer platform available.

name: Reducto
description: An AI document parser that converts complex PDFs to markdown/JSON.
access_detail: Free trial with 100 free pages is available immediately.

name: Devin
description: An autonomous AI software engineer built by Cognition.
access_detail: Currently requires waitlist sign up or paid corporate access keys.
blocker: Requires early access waitlist approval or paid enterprise subscription.

name: higgsfield
description: A video generation AI creation suite.
access_detail: Currently invitation-only/waitlisted. CLI/API docs are restricted to selected partners.

name: Mermaid CLI
description: A command-line utility to compile Mermaid text diagrams into images.
access_detail: Completely open-source local command line tool.

name: YouTube Transcript
description: A utility/API to fetch transcripts for YouTube videos.
access_detail: Accessible via community-hosted APIs or local python packages for free.

name: Grain
description: An AI meeting recording and clip-sharing platform.
access_detail: Available on Enterprise/custom plans. No public, free self-serve API access dashboard.
blocker: Requires an active enterprise contract or paid team plan.
